## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.12.3

### Cameras
- Restores the default camera live view request to the APK-aligned `/device/newstartlive` endpoint with `liveResolution`.
- Keeps the default stream source path separate from the experimental X-Sense WebRTC bridge option.
- Keeps camera entity setup from starting a live session during Home Assistant WebRTC provider probing.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for the restored APK start-live request and default camera stream source path.
- Confirms the full Python test suite and the Go bridge test pass with these changes.
